attack_chain.description: Attackers initiated a wide social media phishing campaign targeting company employees, particularly in IT and security departments.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: attackers initiated a wide social media phishing campaign targeting company employees

evidence_chunks.quote: attackers initiated a wide social media phishing campaign targeting company employees
attackers initiated a wide social media phishing campaign targeting company employees

attack_chain.description: Social engineering used to convince IT/security employees to download and execute malicious payloads concealed in technical programs and data files.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Clever social engineering was used to convince these employees to download and execute malicious payloads concealed in a variety of technical programs and data files

evidence_chunks.quote: Clever social engineering was used to convince these employees to download and execute malicious payloads concealed in a variety of technical programs and data files
Clever social engineering was used to convince these employees to download and execute malicious payloads concealed in a variety of technical programs and data files

attack_chain.description: A cloud dev-ops engineer executed the malicious infostealer payload on their personal home computer, which lacked EDR.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: a cloud dev-ops engineer executed the malicious payload on their personal home computer

evidence_chunks.quote: a cloud dev-ops engineer executed the malicious payload on their personal home computer
a cloud dev-ops engineer executed the malicious payload on their personal home computer

attack_chain.description: Attackers extracted valid Citrix session cookies from the compromised employee laptop.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: this allowed attackers to extract valid Citrix session cookies from the compromised employee laptop

evidence_chunks.quote: this allowed attackers to extract valid Citrix session cookies from the compromised employee laptop
this allowed attackers to extract valid Citrix session cookies from the compromised employee laptop

attack_chain.technique_name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Web Session Cookie
attack_chain.description: Attackers hijacked a valid privileged Citrix session into the corporate network using the stolen session cookies.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: successfully hijack a valid privileged session into the corporate network

evidence_chunks.quote: successfully hijack a valid privileged session into the corporate network
successfully hijack a valid privileged session into the corporate network

attack_chain.description: Attackers used RDP access from the hijacked Citrix session to reach the jump server used to manage the AWS environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: This session contained direct RDP access to a jump server used to access and manage the company’s production AWS environment

evidence_chunks.quote: This session contained direct RDP access to a jump server used to access and manage the company’s production AWS environment
This session contained direct RDP access to a jump server used to access and manage the company’s production AWS environment

attack_chain.description: Attackers extracted highly privileged AWS access keys from the jump server.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: From this server attackers were able to extract highly privileged AWS access keys

evidence_chunks.quote: From this server attackers were able to extract highly privileged AWS access keys
From this server attackers were able to extract highly privileged AWS access keys

attack_chain.description: Attackers used the stolen AWS access keys to authenticate to the production AWS environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: proceed to the main phase of the attack

evidence_chunks.quote: proceed to the main phase of the attack
proceed to the main phase of the attack

attack_chain.description: Attackers automated cloud reconnaissance using pre-existing scripts to enumerate resources across the AWS environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: leaves little doubt that much of it was automated leveraging pre-existing cloud reconnaissance scripts and techniques

evidence_chunks.quote: leaves little doubt that much of it was automated leveraging pre-existing cloud reconnaissance scripts and techniques
leaves little doubt that much of it was automated leveraging pre-existing cloud reconnaissance scripts and techniques

attack_chain.description: Attackers exfiltrated data from S3 storage buckets containing client data.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: they began exfiltrating data from S3 storage buckets

evidence_chunks.quote: they began exfiltrating data from S3 storage buckets
they began exfiltrating data from S3 storage buckets

attack_chain.description: Attackers exfiltrated data from sensitive RDS databases containing client data.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: exfiltrating data from S3 storage buckets and sensitive RDS databases containing client data

evidence_chunks.quote: exfiltrating data from S3 storage buckets and sensitive RDS databases containing client data
exfiltrating data from S3 storage buckets and sensitive RDS databases containing client data

attack_chain.description: Attackers installed reverse shells on EC2 instances across multiple VPCs for persistent command execution.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: installing reverse shells on EC2 instances in multiple VPCs

evidence_chunks.quote: installing reverse shells on EC2 instances in multiple VPCs
installing reverse shells on EC2 instances in multiple VPCs

attack_chain.description: Attackers deleted local OS logs from compromised EC2 instances to prevent analysis of logins and executed commands.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Deleting local OS logs from compromised EC2 instances to prevent analysis of logins and executed commands

evidence_chunks.quote: Deleting local OS logs from compromised EC2 instances to prevent analysis of logins and executed commands
Deleting local OS logs from compromised EC2 instances to prevent analysis of logins and executed commands

attack_chain.technique_name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Cloud Logs
attack_chain.description: Attackers modified S3 and RDS audit policies to prevent the organization from determining what data was being accessed.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: modifying S3 and RDS audit policies to prevent the organization from knowing exactly which data was being accessed

evidence_chunks.quote: modifying S3 and RDS audit policies to prevent the organization from knowing exactly which data was being accessed
modifying S3 and RDS audit policies to prevent the organization from knowing exactly which data was being accessed

attack_chain.description: Attackers exfiltrated sensitive organizational data over an extended 17+ month period.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the attack had been going on for over 17 months

evidence_chunks.quote: the attack had been going on for over 17 months
the attack had been going on for over 17 months

attack_chain.description: After eradication attempts, attackers re-acquired AWS access through the compromised on-premises jump server repeatedly.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Once their access to AWS was revoked, they simply acquired new access through the compromised on-premises jump server

evidence_chunks.quote: Once their access to AWS was revoked, they simply acquired new access through the compromised on-premises jump server
Once their access to AWS was revoked, they simply acquired new access through the compromised on-premises jump server
